items.why: "Understanding and utilizing this GitHub code from the 'awesome-chatgpt-prompts' repository can be incredibly beneficial for your task. It's designed to enhance the use of ChatGPT and other Language Model tools, with a focus on prompt engineering. By learning from this resource, you can create more effective AI prompts, which could be used to generate insightful content for your Monthly Business Review slides in healthcare claims.
